design_vision.philosophy: A high-end, consultative CRM that merges the rigorous efficiency of a Kanban pipeline with the elegant, tactile aesthetics of the luxury cosmetics industry.
design_vision.emotion: Professional, authoritative, sleek, and highly organized.
design_vision.contrast_strategy: High contrast structural grayscale to highlight data. Color is purely functional (lead temperatures) and used sparingly to guide the eye.

rules.anti_default: Banned: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans. Headings must have tracking-tight.
rules.hierarchy: Max heading size is text-5xl on desktop. Do not skip more than 2 steps in typography hierarchy.
rules.body: Left-align all paragraphs and dense information. Use loose line-height (leading-relaxed) for readability.

heading.usage: Used for main dashboard titles, modal headers, and column names.

body.usage: Used for card text, dynamic forms, and chat messages.

mono.usage: Used for numerical data, IDs, and metrics.

spacing.scale: p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8. Ensure generous padding in side-sheets (p-8).

structure.navigation: Sidebar navigation for global menus (Dashboard, Pipeline, Tasks, Settings).
structure.main_area: Central area dominated by the Kanban board.
structure.kanban_board: Grid/Flex layout with horizontal scroll. Columns have subtle border-r or gap-4 spacing.
structure.side_sheet: When clicking a card, open a Shadcn Sheet (Slide-over) spanning 40-50% of the screen width for history/details.
structure.radius: Subtle roundness, max 8px (rounded-md/lg). Avoid overly circular 'pill' buttons unless primary.

kanban_card.style: Flat background with 1px subtle border, no shadow in rest state. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.

side_sheet_modal.style: Glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40). Solid surface for the panel itself with sharp 1px border. Do not use glass for the readable content panel.
side_sheet_modal.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs for Timeline, Form Fields, and WhatsApp Chat.

forms.style: Use Shadcn inputs. Solid borders, subtle focus rings (focus:ring-primary). Never native inputs.

badges.style: Lead temperature badges must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.1em] text-xs font-semibold).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must define text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties, e.g., transition-transform duration-200 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.drag_drop: Smooth scale up (scale-105) and drop-shadow-xl when a card is being dragged.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, strictly functional.

images.description: Premium cosmetic product shot for proposal/sample reference.
Perfume bottle for pipeline card thumbnail.
Abstract premium cosmetics liquid texture for the multi-tenant login page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected fonts (Outfit for headers, Manrope for body). Install them via standard font imports.
Build the central Kanban board using dnd-kit or @hello-pangea/dnd with drag-and-drop support.
Implement the 'Card Side-sheet Modal' using the Shadcn Sheet component. Ensure it has Tabs for Timeline, Form, and WhatsApp.
Implement the Lead Temperature Badges (Cold, Warm, Hot) using the exact color tokens provided in the semantic section.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Override default generic Shadcn radii to max 8px (rounded-md).
Never use the Inter font. Apply tracking-tight to headings.
